title: Traralgon to Wonthaggi bus timetable change
articleDescription: The weekday morning Traralgon to Wonthaggi bus will leave earlier, giving passengers more time in Wonthaggi before the afternoon return trip.
articleContent:
From Monday 6 July 2026, the weekday morning Traralgon to Wonthaggi bus will depart 1 hour and 19 minutes earlier.

The bus will now depart Traralgon Station at 9:03am and arrive at Wonthaggi Bus Interchange at 10:58am.

This change will give passengers more time in Wonthaggi before the 1:35pm return trip.

  • Traralgon Station: 9:03am
  • Leongatha Station: 10:17am
  • Inverloch: 10:40am
  • Wonthaggi Bus Interchange: 10:58am

Plan your journey
